TTTCR ^Tf, W | ? K (*fpfr) i6«*4«i: «f>sl<j m<jq°i i-i^i^i ^ts ffecf ^hiH" qi^tl 5j^r s i t ^ ^ M T ^TPCd" % <I-JIMI ti<s*ii>i Wr.'FT.f't. 998(5?), qi0<g 21 Mc^T, 1 9 7 4 ^ ^ ^ % ^ ^ " ^ ^sfrcsrRfa-u^jfiH a r f ^ ^ H I ti^i+^T.srr. 1 6 2 1 ( ^ ) H T ^ 2 7 t % c m , 2006 s m f%*rr TPTT «rr i MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FORESTS AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd March, 2015 S.0.814(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 and sub-section (6) of section 5 of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974), and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 1621 (E), dated the 27th September, 2006, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby reconstitutes the Central Pollution Control Board and nominates the following persons as its members, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely :- SI. No. 1. Name and Address Shri Shashi Shekhar, Special Secretary, Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change, and Chairman, Central Pollution Control Board, Delhi Remarks Chairman Members nominated under clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 3 2. 3. 4. 5. 6. Shri Praveen Prakash, Joint Secretary (Works and Swachh Bharat Mission), Ministry of Urban Development, New Delhi Shri Anil Kumar Singh, Joint Secretary (Thermal), Ministry of Power, New Delhi Dr. Amita Prasad, Joint Secretary (A), Ministry of Water Resources and Ganga Rejuvenation, New Delhi Shri S.S. Mohanty, Additional Secretary and Financial Adviser, Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change, New Delhi Dr. Rashid Hasan, Adviser, CP Division, Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change, New Delhi Member Member Member Member Member Members nominated under clause (c) of sub-section (2) of section 3 7. 8. 9. 10. Shri Syed Javed Abbas, Chairman, Uttar Pradesh, Pollution Control Board, Lucknow Dr. Ayi Vaman N. Acharya, Chairman, Karnataka Pollution Control Board, Bengaluru Dr. Kalyan Rudra, Chairman, West Bengal Pollution Control Board, Kolkata Dr. K. U. Mistry, Chairman, Gujarat, Pollution Control Board, Gandhi Nagar Member Member Member Member -- 2 of 3 -- [*TPT II-W^S 3 (ii)] <TR?r "?rr TT5FT5T ; araTWT 3 11. Shri Dattatray Dhanakawade, Mayor, Pune Municipal Corporation, Maharashtra Member Members nominated under clause (d) of sub-section (2) of section 3 12. 13. 14. Shri Ramakant Bharadwaj, National Vice President, Laghu Udyog Bharati, Jhandewalan Extn., New Delhi Shri Kanwal Singh Chauhan, Village Atterna, District Sonipat, Haryana Shri Vivek Narayan Shejwalkar, Mayor, Municipal Corporation, Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh Member Member Member Members nominated under clause (e) of sub-section (2) of section 3 15. ft'. Shri N. Kumar, Director (Technical) Coal India Limited, Kolkata Shri Sanjeev Singh, Director (Refineries) Indian Oil Corporation Limited, New Delhi Member Member Member nominated under clause (f) of sub-section (2) of section 3 17. Dr. A.B. Akolkar, Member Secretary, Central Pollution Control Board, Delhi Member Secretary [No. Q-15014/21/2009-CPW] Dr. RASHID HASAN, Adviser (CP) Note: The Principal notification constituting the Central Pollution Control Board was published in the Gazette of India vide, number G.S.R. 998(E), dated the 21st September, 1974 and last reconstituted vide notification number S.O. 1621(E), dated the 27th September, 2006.
